revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsible_lists_option here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
This template includes collapsible lists. {{block indent|em=2|1={{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display all lists when it appears (i.e. all lists expanded), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}all}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|all}}{{spaces|2}}(i.e. omitting {{nowrap|expanded{{=}}}})}}. }} {{Unbulleted list |style=padding-bottom:0.3em; |list_style=line-height:1.5em; | 1 = {{blue|•}} To set it to display one particular list while keeping the remainder collapsed (i.e. hidden apart from their headings), use: | 2 = {{pad|1.2em}}{{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}listname}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|listname}}}} | 3 = …where listname is one of the following (do not include any quotemarks): |item4_style=;padding:0.2em 0 0.3em 1.4em; | 4 = {{#if:{{{listnames|ForTheDemo [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}}}|{{{listnames|{{hlist|foo|bar|baz}}}}}|{{color|red|''Required parameter "listnames" missing!''}}}} | 5 = {{#if:{{{example|ForTheDemo}}} | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}
For example, {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|expanded{{=}}{{{example|foo}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{expandedname|}}}|required|| or {{tlc|{{{template_name|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}}|{{{example|foo}}}}}}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|ForTheDemo}}} | * {{#ifeq:{{{default}}}|all |All lists have | {{small|[''optional:''{{thinsp}}]}}  [All lists have]{{\}}[The list named '''''default''''' has]The list named '''{{{default}}}''' has}} been set to be shown when the template appears. }} }}
